Klein Moretti.eye_color: deep dark brown, appearing pitch black like the night
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, matching brown coat, round felt hat, old leather shoes
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, brown eyes, dressed in a sharp black tuxedo and silk top hat, carrying a plain cane.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Ability to see auras (Spirit Vision) by tapping his glabella twice
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch kept in tuxedo inner lining, black cane
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Old Neil confirms Klein's role/sequence as a 'Seer' multiple times during the mysticism curriculum.

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Text describes her as 'brown-haired' and mentions her changing into a cream-colored dress the next morning.

Dunn Smith.eye_color: deep gray (appearing abnormally deep in darkness)
Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: black trench coat and a halved black top hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Confirmed his use of a specific pen and reinforced his established character trait of forgetfulness.

Leonard Mitchell.primary_clothing: Casual Victorian style, white shirt untucked, black vest draped on
Leonard Mitchell.face_description: handsome with a romantic temperament, deep green eyes, faint smile
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, green eyes, untucked white shirt with a black vest draped casually, poetic but unrestrained demeanor
Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Explicitly described as black-haired and green-eyed with a casual dress style in this chapter

Frye.primary_clothing: Black Nighthawk formal suit, high collar, dark trousers
Frye.face_description: Cold, expressionless face with sharp features and a clinical gaze
Frye.visual_anchor: Mid-30s male, very pale skin, short black hair, cold expressionless face, wearing a dark Victorian Nighthawk outfit
Frye.color_palette: ashen grey, deep black, cold white
Frye.distinguishing_features: Extremely pale skin, often associated with his 'Corpse Collector' role

Royale Reideen.primary_clothing: Dark Victorian dress with subtle lace details, suitable for a Sleepless
Royale Reideen.face_description: Calm and composed face with an air of mysterious elegance
Royale Reideen.visual_anchor: Late 20s female, fair skin, long wavy black hair, calm expression, wearing a dark Victorian gown

Kenley White.primary_clothing: Standard Victorian vest and shirt, often in earthy tones
Kenley White.face_description: Friendly but tired appearance, typical of a Sleepless on duty
Kenley White.visual_anchor: Mid-20s male, medium skin tone, short brown hair, wearing a standard Victorian vest and shirt

Seeka Tron.primary_clothing: Elegant dark Victorian dress with poetic flair, perhaps a high neck
Seeka Tron.face_description: Melancholic and artistic expression, deep-set thoughtful eyes
Seeka Tron.visual_anchor: Mid-20s female, pale skin, long straight black hair, melancholic expression, wearing a dark elegant Victorian dress

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.accessories: silver chain with a moonstone pendulum, gold pocket watch
Old Neil.source_notes: Text mentions he is frail and too advanced in his years

Bredt.primary_clothing: Black top hat, charcoal grey Victorian civilian suit, white shirt, and a dark cravat
Bredt.face_description: A mature and friendly face defined by a thick, bushy black beard and slightly weathered features.
Bredt.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, thick black beard, wearing a black top hat and a charcoal Victorian civilian suit.
Bredt.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, snow white, dark brown
Bredt.source_notes: Identified as a middle-aged civilian staff member with a thick black beard and top hat; celebrating his 15th wedding anniversary.

Klee.primary_clothing: Formal black butler suit, white shirt, dark cravat, carrying a black umbrella and wearing a hat
Klee.face_description: Long and thin face, slightly gaunt features, with a sincere but anxious expression
Klee.visual_anchor: Tall and lanky mid-40s male butler, pale skin, wearing a black Victorian suit and top hat, often carrying a wet umbrella
Klee.color_palette: deep black, pale ivory, charcoal grey
Klee.source_notes: Described as lanky, tall, and skinny butler of Mr. Vickroy

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Died by repeatedly hitting his head against a wall
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Police confirmed his death by apparent suicide in his house.

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.

Vickroy.primary_clothing: Victorian merchant suit, dark brown wool, white collared shirt
Vickroy.face_description: Standard merchant features, likely showing signs of stress and worry
Vickroy.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male tobacco merchant, fair skin, short dark brown hair, wearing a professional Victorian merchant's waistcoat and suit
Vickroy.source_notes: Mentioned as a tobacco merchant whose son was kidnapped

Elliott.primary_clothing: Young boy's Victorian attire, white shirt, dark knickerbockers
Elliott.face_description: Youthful, round face with soft features
Elliott.visual_anchor: Young Victorian boy, fair skin, messy light brown hair, wearing a white shirt and dark knickerbockers
Elliott.source_notes: The kidnapped son of Mr. Vickroy

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Appearance explicitly described in the chapter text when Klein meets her in the finance office.
